name: MCCB / Large Circuit Breaker Lockout
shortDescription: Toothed-grip lockout for moulded-case circuit breakers up to 3 inches wide.
longDescription: Locks out three-phase MCCBs (227V and above) that a standard MCB lockout can't grip — moulded teeth bite onto the breaker lever for a strong hold, fitting levers up to 3 inches wide and 0.9 inches thick. Rugged stainless steel and PVC construction resists corrosion in plant environments, with normal-screw and foldable-screw fitting options.

images.alt: MCCB / Large Circuit Breaker Lockout supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
